description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine change_swsref_2, and is implemented by a call to change_swsref_2. Use this API to change the value of the element of the SWREF array associated with a specified switched shunt. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.2.1. ierr = change_swsref(ibus, newval)

parameters.name: newval
parameters.description: New value to be assigned to the swsref array entry associated with switched shunt at bus ibus. (input).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - no table mode for switched shunt at this bus. - switched shunt dynamic model at this switched shunt is bypassed.
